text.title: python-fastapi Output Contract
text.summary: Required FastAPI app shape and per-endpoint invariants.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.code:
# main.py from contextlib import asynccontextmanager @asynccontextmanager async def lifespan(app: FastAPI): app.state.db = await create_async_engine(...) yield await app.state.db.dispose() app = FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan)
# deps.py DBSession = Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)]
# schemas.py class UserBase(BaseModel): email: EmailStr class UserCreate(UserBase): password: str class UserResponse(UserBase): id: UUID model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
# users.py route @router.post("/users", response_model=UserResponse) async def create_user(payload: UserCreate, db: DBSession) -> User: return await users_service.create(db, payload)

example.note: 4 violations: on_event deprecated, schema reuse, sync def, dict return.

list.item: Routes use Annotated alias for DBSession and CurrentUser.
Service functions are async def, accept typed params, return ORM (not dict).
flush+refresh pattern used to fetch generated IDs.
